name: repo-patch-jsonl-v0

stages.name: architecture-validation
stages.description: Validate a normalized repo-patch dataset with one task.

stages.name: behavior-pilot
stages.description: Observe mixed tasks from any repo-patch benchmark that can be normalized into JSONL.

notes: Use this preset when a benchmark can be normalized into records with repo, base_commit, problem_statement, and optional tests.
Pair with --dataset-jsonl and a benchmark-specific --command for grading.
